mission_summary: A visually attractive shortcut may trap the agent into budget loss.
map_hint: The shortest visible route is not always the safest route.
goal: Avoid the shortcut trap and still complete the mission.

mission_summary: The agent must preserve enough energy to unlock the final objective.
map_hint: Spending too much energy early prevents a correct finish later.
goal: Complete the mission without running out of energy before the final move.
